examples: He was busily engaged repairing his bike.
The doctor worked busily beneath the blinding lights of the delivery room.
The twelve jurors were all writing very busily on slates.
"The recovery everyone is busily forecasting for Asia in 1999 will just not come, " he says.
The nondancing courtiers perform amateurishly and busily, improvising and cape-swirling with little decorum or refinement.
